info.name: Apollo-like
info.description: API contract for the Apollo-like project. Maintained daily by backend-dev-1 (search) and backend-dev-2 (auth/lists/exports). Frontend devs use the Examples here as mock responses while backend is being built.

item.name: People
item.description: Search and detail endpoints for people. Owned by backend-dev-1.

item.name: Companies
item.description: Search and detail endpoints for companies. Owned by backend-dev-1.

item.name: Auth & Me
item.description: Auth.js endpoints + current-user routes. Owned by backend-dev-2.

item.name: Lists
item.description: Saved lists CRUD, items, and sharing. Owned by backend-dev-2.

item.name: Exports
item.description: CSV export endpoints. Owned by backend-dev-2.
